mechanism_narrative: Higher federal funds rates increase the discount rate for equity valuations and compress corporate profit margins, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show positive mean returns when FEDFUNDS rises, or Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when UNRATE is below 4.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand strength and economic momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when RSAFS and HOUST diverge in direction, or out-of-sample R-squared drops below 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects improving corporate output capacity and supply chain normalization, which triggers short-term positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to precede positive 5-day returns when CPIAUCSL exceeds 3.5% year-over-year, or the signal shows negative alpha in backtests.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.5%, a concurrent decline in total nonfarm payrolls confirms monetary policy transmission to the labor market, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regressions, or SPX returns remain positive despite the joint signal.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly growth in real gross domestic product directly correlates with corporate earnings revisions and equity market momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show no significant correlation with 60-day forward returns, or Rank IC remains below 0.01 across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 310.0, elevated inflation expectations force markets to price in prolonged restrictive monetary policy, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20-day returns in > 60% of instances when CPIAUCSL crosses the threshold, or the signal is subsumed by FEDFUNDS movements.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls signal robust economic activity and immediate earnings optimism, triggering positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS increases fail to predict positive 5-day returns when UNRATE simultaneously rises, or the signal shows negative predictive accuracy in walk-forward tests.
